testcase.classname: 5G SA registration and deregistration of single UE

property.name: Comments
property.value: 10/10 reg+dereg, 100% success, latency 94ms reg / 25ms dereg

property.name: Comments
property.value: PASS: VAMOS Exec ID 1514, 2026-03-18. Intra-O-DU handover validated. Procedures: Registration, PDU Session Establishment, NR Handover In/Out, Deregistration — all successful. RRC Handover Complete command verified. Radio params (RSRP, RSRQ, CQI, PDSCH SINR) processed. L1 DL/UL stats (BLER, MCS, throughput, PRB, slots), MIMO Rank, L3 DL/UL throughput — all PASS. Event A3 measurement in rrcReconfiguration verified. No call drops.

property.name: Comments
property.value: VAMOS-2 DTMA-2 UID1/UID3 PASS 2026-05-13. Inter-O-DU mobility verified — true handover, both cells exposed via TM500 mobility profile. Builds on 2026-05-06 cell-change-via-release breakthrough.

property.name: Comments
property.value: VAMOS-2 DTMA-2 UID3 PASS 2026-05-16. Inter-O-CU (Xn) HO verified. Fix in image b06b7b1b. ISS-025 resolved.

testcase.classname: Registration and deregistration to a single network slice

property.name: Comments
property.value: 100% success rate, Static Radio Conditions

testcase.classname: Registration and deregistration to multiple network slices

property.name: Comments
property.value: 100% success rate, Static Radio Conditions

property.name: Comments
property.value: PASS on image 8de7d4b (split CU/DU dual-cell intra-freq). VAMOS-2 TLS verdict: Pass (Job 1763, 21:18-21:29 UTC). DTMA-2 UID3 @ NLA_8_20_0_REV05. Prior SIB2 issue (ISS-005) no longer reproducing. si_window_length=5 and intraFreqReselection not blockers.

property.name: Comments
property.value: VAMOS-2 DTMA-2 UID3. Idle Mode Inter-O-DU mobility verified PASS 2026-05-06.

property.name: Comments
property.value: VAMOS-2 DTMA-2 UID1/UID3 PASS 2026-05-13. Idle Mode Inter-O-CU mobility verified.

property.name: Comments
property.value: L1 1417.13 Mbps, App ~1380 Mbps, Rank 4, MCS 27, BLER 0%, RSRP -66 dBm, SINR 39.2 dB

property.name: Comments
property.value: L1 103.40 Mbps, App ~101 Mbps, MCS 27, BLER 0%, RSRP -65 dBm, SINR 15 dB

testcase.classname: Bidirectional throughput in different radio conditions.

property.name: Comments
property.value: PASS: All 4 radio conditions pass. DL scheduler starvation (ISS-001) resolved. Re-tested 2026-02-21.

testcase.classname: └─ Bidirectional throughput in excellent radio conditions

property.name: Comments
property.value: PASS: DL L1 1407.12 Mbps, UL L1 101.53 Mbps, DL MCS 26.8, UL MCS 27, RSRP -69 dBm, Rank 4, 787 DL slots

testcase.classname: └─ Bidirectional throughput in good radio conditions

property.name: Comments
property.value: PASS: DL L1 786.60 Mbps, UL L1 34.70 Mbps, DL MCS 17.2, UL MCS 9.7, RSRP -86 dBm, Rank 4, 800 DL slots

testcase.classname: └─ Bidirectional throughput in fair radio conditions

property.name: Comments
property.value: PASS (was FAIL on Feb 10): DL L1 293.12 Mbps, UL L1 7.38 Mbps, DL MCS 6.3, UL MCS 1.6, RSRP -96 dBm, Rank 4, 800 DL slots. DL scheduler starvation (ISS-001) resolved.

testcase.classname: └─ Bidirectional throughput in poor radio conditions

property.name: Comments
property.value: PASS: DL L1 34.48 Mbps, UL L1 3.66 Mbps, DL MCS 2.3, UL MCS 0.2, RSRP -106 dBm, Rank 1, 800 DL slots

property.name: Comments
property.value: Peak: L1 1417.13 Mbps, App ~1380 Mbps. Link budget: L1 28 Mbps, RSRP -106 dBm

property.name: Comments
property.value: Peak: L1 81 Mbps, App ~70 Mbps. Link budget: L1 3.70 Mbps, RSRP -106 dBm

property.name: Comments
property.value: 48-hour long-hours stability run PASS. gNB stable throughout the full 48h: 0 crashes, 0 restarts; one self-limited congestion RLF episode ridden through without restart; memory plateaued. Build e7bda6e7. Started 2026-06-29 21:32 UTC, completed 2026-07-01. TVE verdict: Pass.

property.name: Comments
property.value: ISS-056: CU-UP PDCP UL integrity COUNT-desync. ~14M UL PDU drops across 100 UEs / all DRBs from +48min on build 1a976144 + sr_period_ms=80. UE-side DL integrity-fail=0 (gNB UL RX only). Root-caused; SRS fix pending (#71).

skipped.message: Test 10.4.2 skipped
